steps.title: Identify the antecedent and its number
steps.content: The previous sentence names two woodcuts: Evening at Carl Inn and Lake Basin in the High Sierra. The blank in "In 2019, ______ exhibited alongside 150 of Obata's other works" must refer to those two woodcuts, so the pronoun must be plural and clearly identify them.

steps.title: Eliminate wrong choices and confirm the answer
steps.content:
Evaluate all four choices:
  • Choice A — it was: singular pronoun — does not agree in number with the plural antecedent "woodcuts." ✗
  • Choice B — they were: plural pronoun that agrees with "woodcuts" and clearly identifies the two named works as what was exhibited. ✓
  • Choice C — this was: singular pronoun — does not agree in number with the plural antecedent "woodcuts." ✗
  • Choice D — some were: plural in form but illogical — "some" of only two woodcuts is vague and does not clearly identify the specific works named. ✗
B is correct.
